mapper.sql: id, dispatchName, dispatchNo, dispatchSeq, contractNos, projectIds, type, state, peopleNum, callbackState, facilitatorId, facilitatorCode, facilitatorName, bankInfo, bankAccount, officeCode, profitDepCode, dutyPerson, officeDutyPerson, isAccrued, isInvoiced, dispatchAmount, prepaidInfo, prepaidRule, acceptanceInfo, reason, remark, dispatchTime, smsProjectCode, smsSubmitTime, smsProjectAmount, effectiveForm, effectiveTo, disabled, dispatched, settled, createBy, createTime, updateBy, updateTime, customInfo

SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()
insert into pm_dispatch_project_header (dispatchName, dispatchNo, dispatchSeq, contractNos, projectIds, type, state, peopleNum, callbackState, facilitatorId, facilitatorCode, facilitatorName, bankInfo, bankAccount, officeCode, profitDepCode, dutyPerson, officeDutyPerson, isAccrued, isInvoiced, dispatchAmount, prepaidInfo, prepaidRule, acceptanceInfo, reason, remark, dispatchTime, smsProjectCode, smsSubmitTime, smsProjectAmount, effectiveForm, effectiveTo, disabled, dispatched, settled, createBy, createTime, updateBy, updateTime, customInfo) values (#{dispatchName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dispatchNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dispatchSeq,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{contractNos,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{projectIds,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{type,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{state,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{peopleNum,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{callbackState,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{facilitatorId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{facilitatorCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{facilitatorName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{bankInfo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{bankAccount,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{officeCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{profitDepCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dutyPerson,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{officeDutyPerson,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{isAccrued,jdbcType=BIT}, #{isInvoiced,jdbcType=BIT}, #{dispatchAmount,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{prepaidInfo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{prepaidRule,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{acceptanceInfo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{reason,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dispatchTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{smsProjectCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{smsSubmitTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{smsProjectAmount,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{effectiveForm,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{effectiveTo,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{disabled,jdbcType=BIT}, #{dispatched,jdbcType=BIT}, #{settled,jdbcType=BIT}, #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{customInfo,jdbcType=OTHER})

mapper.update:
update pm_dispatch_project_header
dispatchName = #{dispatchName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
dispatchNo = #{dispatchNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
dispatchSeq = #{dispatchSeq,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
contractNos = #{contractNos,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
projectIds = #{projectIds,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
type = #{type,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
state = #{state,jdbcType=INTEGER},
peopleNum = #{peopleNum,jdbcType=INTEGER},
callbackState = #{callbackState,jdbcType=INTEGER},
facilitatorId = #{facilitatorId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
facilitatorCode = #{facilitatorCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
facilitatorName = #{facilitatorName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
bankInfo = #{bankInfo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
bankAccount = #{bankAccount,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
officeCode = #{officeCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
profitDepCode = #{profitDepCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
dutyPerson = #{dutyPerson,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
officeDutyPerson = #{officeDutyPerson,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
isAccrued = #{isAccrued,jdbcType=BIT},
isInvoiced = #{isInvoiced,jdbcType=BIT},
dispatchAmount = #{dispatchAmount,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
prepaidInfo = #{prepaidInfo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
prepaidRule = #{prepaidRule,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
acceptanceInfo = #{acceptanceInfo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
reason = #{reason,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
remark = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
dispatchTime = #{dispatchTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
smsProjectCode = #{smsProjectCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
smsSubmitTime = #{smsSubmitTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
smsProjectAmount = #{smsProjectAmount,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
effectiveForm = #{effectiveForm,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
effectiveTo = #{effectiveTo,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
disabled = #{disabled,jdbcType=BIT},
dispatched = #{dispatched,jdbcType=BIT},
settled = #{settled,jdbcType=BIT},
createBy = #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
createTime = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
updateBy = #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
updateTime = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
customInfo = #{customInfo,jdbcType=OTHER},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update pm_dispatch_project_header set dispatchName = #{dispatchName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, dispatchNo = #{dispatchNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, dispatchSeq = #{dispatchSeq,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, contractNos = #{contractNos,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, projectIds = #{projectIds,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, type = #{type,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, state = #{state,jdbcType=INTEGER}, peopleNum = #{peopleNum,jdbcType=INTEGER}, callbackState = #{callbackState,jdbcType=INTEGER}, facilitatorId = #{facilitatorId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, facilitatorCode = #{facilitatorCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, facilitatorName = #{facilitatorName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, bankInfo = #{bankInfo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, bankAccount = #{bankAccount,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, officeCode = #{officeCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, profitDepCode = #{profitDepCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, dutyPerson = #{dutyPerson,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, officeDutyPerson = #{officeDutyPerson,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, isAccrued = #{isAccrued,jdbcType=BIT}, isInvoiced = #{isInvoiced,jdbcType=BIT}, dispatchAmount = #{dispatchAmount,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, prepaidInfo = #{prepaidInfo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, prepaidRule = #{prepaidRule,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, acceptanceInfo = #{acceptanceInfo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, reason = #{reason,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, remark = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, dispatchTime = #{dispatchTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, smsProjectCode = #{smsProjectCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, smsSubmitTime = #{smsSubmitTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, smsProjectAmount = #{smsProjectAmount,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, effectiveForm = #{effectiveForm,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, effectiveTo = #{effectiveTo,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, disabled = #{disabled,jdbcType=BIT}, dispatched = #{dispatched,jdbcType=BIT}, settled = #{settled,jdbcType=BIT}, createBy = #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, createTime = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, updateBy = #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, updateTime = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, customInfo = #{customInfo,jdbcType=OTHER} where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

select * from pm_dispatch_project_header
id = #{model.id, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
dispatchName = #{model.dispatchName, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
dispatchNo = #{model.dispatchNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
dispatchSeq = #{model.dispatchSeq, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
contractNos = #{model.contractNos, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
projectIds = #{model.projectIds, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
type = #{model.type, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
state = #{model.state, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
peopleNum = #{model.peopleNum, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
callbackState = #{model.callbackState, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
facilitatorId = #{model.facilitatorId, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
facilitatorCode = #{model.facilitatorCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
facilitatorName = #{model.facilitatorName, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
bankInfo = #{model.bankInfo, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
bankAccount = #{model.bankAccount, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
officeCode = #{model.officeCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
profitDepCode = #{model.profitDepCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
dutyPerson = #{model.dutyPerson, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
officeDutyPerson = #{model.officeDutyPerson, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
isAccrued = #{model.isAccrued, jdbcType=BIT} AND
isInvoiced = #{model.isInvoiced, jdbcType=BIT} AND
dispatchAmount = #{model.dispatchAmount, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
prepaidInfo = #{model.prepaidInfo, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
prepaidRule = #{model.prepaidRule, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
acceptanceInfo = #{model.acceptanceInfo, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
reason = #{model.reason, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
remark = #{model.remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
dispatchTime = #{model.dispatchTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
smsProjectCode = #{model.smsProjectCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
smsSubmitTime = #{model.smsSubmitTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
smsProjectAmount = #{model.smsProjectAmount, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
effectiveForm = #{model.effectiveForm, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
effectiveTo = #{model.effectiveTo, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
disabled = #{model.disabled, jdbcType=BIT} AND
dispatched = #{model.dispatched, jdbcType=BIT} AND
settled = #{model.settled, jdbcType=BIT} AND
createBy = #{model.createBy, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
createTime = #{model.createTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
updateBy = #{model.updateBy, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
updateTime = #{model.updateTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
customInfo = #{model.customInfo, jdbcType=OTHER} AND
( dispatchName like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or dispatchNo like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or dispatchSeq like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or contractNos like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or facilitatorName like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or bankInfo like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or bankAccount like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or officeCode like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or profitDepCode like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or dutyPerson like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or officeDutyPerson like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or dispatchAmount like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or prepaidInfo like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or prepaidRule like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or acceptanceInfo like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or reason like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or remark like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or smsProjectCode like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or smsProjectAmount like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or createBy like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or updateBy like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or )
order by ${orderBy}
order by id desc
limit #{start}, #{pageSize}

select count(1) from pm_dispatch_project_header

dispatchName = #{model.dispatchName, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
dispatchNo = #{model.dispatchNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND

( dispatchName like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or dispatchNo like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or dispatchSeq like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or contractNos like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or facilitatorName like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or bankInfo like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or bankAccount like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or officeCode like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or profitDepCode like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or dutyPerson like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or officeDutyPerson like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or dispatchAmount like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or prepaidInfo like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or prepaidRule like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or acceptanceInfo like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or reason like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or remark like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or smsProjectCode like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or smsProjectAmount like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or createBy like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or updateBy like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or )
mapper.insert:
insert into pm_dispatch_project_header
id,
dispatchName,
dispatchNo,
dispatchSeq,
contractNos,
projectIds,
type,
state,
peopleNum,
callbackState,
facilitatorId,
facilitatorCode,
facilitatorName,
bankInfo,
bankAccount,
officeCode,
profitDepCode,
dutyPerson,
officeDutyPerson,
isAccrued,
isInvoiced,
dispatchAmount,
prepaidInfo,
prepaidRule,
acceptanceInfo,
reason,
remark,
dispatchTime,
smsProjectCode,
smsSubmitTime,
smsProjectAmount,
effectiveForm,
effectiveTo,
disabled,
dispatched,
settled,
createBy,
createTime,
updateBy,
updateTime,
customInfo,
#{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{dispatchName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{dispatchNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{dispatchSeq,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{contractNos,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{projectIds,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{type,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{state,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{peopleNum,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{callbackState,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{facilitatorId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{facilitatorCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{facilitatorName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{bankInfo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{bankAccount,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{officeCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{profitDepCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{dutyPerson,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{officeDutyPerson,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{isAccrued,jdbcType=BIT},
#{isInvoiced,jdbcType=BIT},
#{dispatchAmount,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{prepaidInfo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{prepaidRule,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{acceptanceInfo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{reason,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{dispatchTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{smsProjectCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{smsSubmitTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{smsProjectAmount,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{effectiveForm,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{effectiveTo,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{disabled,jdbcType=BIT},
#{dispatched,jdbcType=BIT},
#{settled,jdbcType=BIT},
#{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{customInfo,jdbcType=OTHER},
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE
dispatchName = values(dispatchName),
dispatchNo = values(dispatchNo),
dispatchSeq = values(dispatchSeq),
contractNos = values(contractNos),
projectIds = values(projectIds),
type = values(type),
state = values(state),
peopleNum = values(peopleNum),
callbackState = values(callbackState),
facilitatorId = values(facilitatorId),
facilitatorCode = values(facilitatorCode),
facilitatorName = values(facilitatorName),
bankInfo = values(bankInfo),
bankAccount = values(bankAccount),
officeCode = values(officeCode),
profitDepCode = values(profitDepCode),
dutyPerson = values(dutyPerson),
officeDutyPerson = values(officeDutyPerson),
isAccrued = values(isAccrued),
isInvoiced = values(isInvoiced),
dispatchAmount = values(dispatchAmount),
prepaidInfo = values(prepaidInfo),
prepaidRule = values(prepaidRule),
acceptanceInfo = values(acceptanceInfo),
reason = values(reason),
remark = values(remark),
dispatchTime = values(dispatchTime),
smsProjectCode = values(smsProjectCode),
smsSubmitTime = values(smsSubmitTime),
smsProjectAmount = values(smsProjectAmount),
effectiveForm = values(effectiveForm),
effectiveTo = values(effectiveTo),
disabled = values(disabled),
dispatched = values(dispatched),
settled = values(settled),
updateBy = values(updateBy),
updateTime = values(updateTime),
customInfo = values(customInfo),
